sourcePrompt: A plain utilitarian concrete town building, a two-story Vietnamese government office or small hotel about ten meters wide. A flat-roofed rectangular block with its concrete frame showing as a grid around rows of plain rectangular windows, a recessed ground-floor entrance behind a couple of square columns, and a low parapet hiding the roof.. Low-poly, blocky, modular; simple readable silhouette.
